apps.title: Hello Homebrew
apps.author: FreeShop
apps.description: Placeholder catalog entry used to verify the fetch/list/download/install flow end-to-end.
apps.longDescription: This is not a real Switch application. It's a plain text file standing in for a compiled .nro so the server and client can be exercised end-to-end before any real homebrew is added to the catalog. Replace this entry (and the file at server/public/downloads/hello-homebrew/0.1.0/) with a real .nro once you have one.
